overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a grassy prairie landscape with a large rocky butte in the distance. The character encounters a horse rider and later horse-drawn carriages while traveling along a dirt path under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with dirt road and distant rocky butte

events.description: horse rider enters from right and passes by on the road
camera passes under low-hanging tree branches temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the rocky butte in the distance

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback traveling in the opposite direction along the road

entered.detail: large rocky formation with smoke rising from the top visible in the distance
winding dirt path cutting through the grassy prairie
scattered evergreen trees dotting the landscape
low-hanging tree branches that temporarily obscure the camera view

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through an open grassy prairie with a large rocky butte visible in the distance. A horse rider passes by in the opposite direction, and the camera briefly moves under some low-hanging tree branches that partially obscure the view.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through the grassy prairie with no other travelers in sight

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the open prairie as the rocky butte shifts to the left side of the frame. The landscape is empty of other travelers, with scattered pine trees visible on the horizon.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from right and passes by on the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy verge as a carriage passes by on the road

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling along the dirt road in the same direction

entered.detail: wooden covered wagon pulled by horses traveling along the road

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn carriage enters the scene from the right and passes by on the dirt road. The character continues walking as the rocky butte shifts from left to right in the background, indicating the camera has passed the midpoint of the journey toward it.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie road with distant rock outcrops

events.description: second horse-drawn carriage enters from right and passes by

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as another carriage passes by on the road

notable_agents.action: second horse-drawn carriage overtaking from behind on the right

entered.detail: smaller rock formation visible on the right horizon
another wooden wagon entering the frame from the right

segments.scene_description: The large rocky butte disappears from view behind the camera as the character continues through the prairie. A second horse-drawn carriage passes by on the road, and a smaller rocky outcrop becomes visible on the right horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt path through an open prairie, transitioning from a journey toward a distant landmark to a passage beyond it. It begins with the character walking past a lone horse rider, briefly dipping under low-hanging tree branches that partially obscure the view of a large rocky butte ahead. As the character continues forward, the landscape opens up with scattered pine trees on the horizon and the butte shifting gradually toward the left of the frame. The scene then shifts as a horse-drawn carriage passes from the right, while the butte moves across the background to the right side of the view. Finally, the large butte disappears behind the camera as a second carriage passes by and a smaller rocky outcrop emerges on the right horizon.
